title: Quantum-Resistant Blockchain Consensus Protocol
disclosure_text: A blockchain consensus mechanism that remains secure against attacks by quantum computers. Uses lattice-based cryptographic primitives for signature verification and a novel proof-of-stake variant that requires validators to periodically refresh their keys using a quantum-secure key derivation function. The protocol maintains compatibility with existing blockchain infrastructure through a hybrid signature scheme that supports both classical ECDSA and quantum-resistant Falcon-512 signatures during a transition period.
